name: blackraptor-ai
description: Governed AI agent teams for Claude Code — a full development team and an executive advisory council, plus a shared bridge of cross-cutting agents (product-manager, evidence-auditor) and skills (Excellence Pass, research-integrity, gate reviews). Install either team; the bridge comes with it, and now the full-stack marketing team (hosted in BlackRaptorAI/BlackRaptor_Agents_Marketing, served through this marketplace).

plugins.name: blackraptor-dev-team
plugins.description: 23 governed dev-team agents (process orchestrator, principal architect, engineers, and blocking-gate reviewers incl. security, privacy, compliance, red-team, and the completion-auditor verification gate) + shared skills: excellence-pass, gate-verdict-format, enforcement-liveness, change-record, stride-review, owasp-llm-checklist, expand-contract-migration. Auto-installs the blackraptor-bridge plugin (shared product-manager + evidence-auditor agents + research-integrity skill).

plugins.name: blackraptor-council
plugins.description: An 11-seat executive advisory council convened through a challenge protocol — gtm-strategy, pricing-strategy, finance, market-insight, ethics-governance, revenue, people-org, and more, coordinated by the council-orchestrator, with the shared product-manager (via the auto-installed blackraptor-bridge) as the product anchor.

plugins.name: blackraptor-bridge
plugins.description: Cross-cutting agents shared by both teams: product-manager (end-to-end product owner bridging market demand and the build) and evidence-auditor (adversarial gate for research/analysis/evidence), plus the research-integrity skill. Auto-installed as a dependency of either team plugin — not installed directly.

plugins.name: blackraptor-marketing
plugins.description: A governed, full-stack marketing department: 15 world-class specialist agents (brand, naming/trademark, market research, content, copy, creative, SEO/GEO, paid media, social/community, email/outbound, video, competitive intel, pricing, analytics, and a campaign coordinator) + 9 skills including the compliance-claims-gate every external asset passes through. Auto-installs blackraptor-bridge (evidence-auditor + research-integrity + product-manager). No autonomous sends, posts, or spend — agents draft, humans approve. Hosted in BlackRaptorAI/BlackRaptor_Agents_Marketing.
